text: AI is rapidly changing the modern workplace. Automation handles repetitive tasks like data entry and scheduling, freeing employees for more creative work. Productivity tools powered by AI, such as smart email filters and project managers, help teams work faster and smarter. However, this technology is leading to significant job changes. Some roles disappear, while others evolve. The key is human-AI collaboration, where employees learn to work alongside intelligent systems. This means focusing on skills that AI cannot easily replicate, like critical thinking, empathy, and complex problem-solving. Adapting to these new tools is becoming essential for career growth.
